ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document setting */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., text, spreadsheet, presentation) */,
  "settings" TEXT /* JSON containing various attributes for the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document settings were created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the document settings were last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document settings are active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page setting */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document settings associated with the page */,
  "page_attributes" TEXT /* JSON containing various page attributes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the page settings were created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the page settings were last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the page settings are active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text list style */,
  "style_attributes" TEXT /* JSON containing attributes that define the text list style */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the text style was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the text style was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the text style is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character setting */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document settings associated with the characters */,
  "char_attributes" TEXT /* JSON containing character attributes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the character settings were created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the character settings were last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the character settings are active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paragraphs" (
  "paragraph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paragraph setting */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document settings associated with the paragraphs */,
  "para_attributes" TEXT /* JSON containing paragraph attributes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the paragraph settings were created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the paragraph settings were last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the paragraph settings are active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paragraph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paragraphs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON containing permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User involved in the collaboration */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Document associated with the collaboration */,
  "collab_date" TEXT /* Date of collaboration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the collaboration initiator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was initiated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the collaboration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Document associated with the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* JSON detailing the specifics of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the changer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Document associated with the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* JSON detailing the specifics of the version changes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the version creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
